user.title: Violet Pool Setup Wizard
user.description:
**Welcome!**

Choose whether you want to start the configuration wizard immediately or open the detailed documentation first.

**Documentation**
• [Configuration Guide (DE)]({docs_de})
• [Configuration Guide (EN)]({docs_en})

Support & Feedback: {issues_url}

data_description.action: Open the documentation or start the setup directly.

data.agreement: I accept all risks and have read the full disclaimer.

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.description:
• Read the [Configuration Guide (DE)]({docs_de}) for step-by-step instructions, safety checklists and feature overviews.
• Need support or have ideas? Open a ticket at {issues_url}.

• Read the [Configuration Guide (EN)]({docs_en}) for step-by-step instructions, safety notes and feature explanations.
• Need assistance or want to share feedback? Open an issue at {issues_url}.

Project repository: {github_url}

Click **Next** to return to the main menu.

connection.title: Controller Connection
connection.description:
Connect your Violet Pool Controller to Home Assistant. Ensure the controller shares the same network and the API is reachable.

Additional docs: [DE]({docs_de}) · [EN]({docs_en})

data_description.username: Optional username if authentication is enabled
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify the SSL certificate. Disable for self-signed certificates.
data_description.device_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant
data_description.device_id: Unique ID if multiple controllers exist

pool_setup.title: Pool Configuration
pool_setup.description: Provide pool size, type and disinfection method. These values are used for runtime optimisation, energy management and dosing calculations.

feature_selection.title: Enable Smart Features
feature_selection.description: Enable only the features your pool installation actually uses. This keeps resource usage low and the UI tidy. You can adjust the selection at any time in the options.

data_description.enable_filter_control: Control the filter pump on demand

sensor_selection.title: Select Sensors
sensor_selection.description:
Choose which sensors you want to see in Home Assistant. Enable or disable individual sensors to keep your dashboard clean and focused.

**Tip:** All available sensors are selected by default. You can adjust this selection at any time in the options.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Controller
reauth_confirm.description:
The controller credentials need to be updated.

Controller: **{controller_name}**
IP: **{api_url}**

zeroconf_confirm.title: Violet Pool Controller Found
zeroconf_confirm.description:
A Violet Pool Controller was discovered on the network.

Name: **{name}**
IP: **{host}**

Would you like to set up this controller now?

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Connection
reconfigure.description:
Update the connection settings for your controller.

Controller: **{controller_name}**

data_description.host: New controller IP or DNS name

repair.title: Repair Controller Connection
repair.description:
The controller **{controller_name}** is not responding.

Verify the controller is powered on and connected to the network, then update the connection settings below.

error.invalid_ip_address:
**Invalid IP address**

Please enter a valid IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
error.cannot_connect:
**Connection failed**

Controller unreachable. Check:
• Is the IP address correct?
• Is the controller powered on?
• Is the network connection OK?
error.invalid_auth:
**Login failed**

Username or password incorrect. If authentication is disabled, leave the fields empty.
error.timeout_connection:
**Connection timeout**

Controller is not responding. It may be overloaded or unreachable.
error.authentication_error:
**Authentication required**

The controller requires login credentials. Please enter username and password.
error.api_endpoint_not_found:
**API endpoint not found**

Controller firmware may be outdated or the URL is incorrect.
error.invalid_pool_size:
**Invalid pool size**

Value must be between 0.1 and 1000 m³.
error.invalid_configuration:
**Configuration error**

One or more inputs are invalid. Please review.
error.api_response_error:
**Invalid controller response**

Controller is sending unexpected data. Firmware update needed?
error.firmware_data_missing:
**Firmware info missing**

Controller firmware version could not be determined.
error.invalid_firmware_version:
**Firmware issue**

Controller firmware appears outdated. Please update.
error.connection_error:
**Network error**

General connection error. Check network settings.
error.already_configured:
**Already configured**

A controller with this IP address is already set up.
error.agreement_declined:
**Setup cancelled**

Setup was cancelled because the safety notice was not accepted.
error.unknown:
**Unknown error**

An unexpected problem occurred. If it persists, contact support.

abort.repair_successful: Repair successful – controller is back online

init.title: Adjust Pool Settings
init.description:
**What would you like to configure?**

Enable/disable features
Select sensors
Change settings

**Tip:** You can return to this selection at any time.

data_description.config_option: Choose what you want to adjust

features.title: Enable/Disable Features
features.description:
**Select the features you want to use**

Enabled features are shown in Home Assistant
Disabled features are hidden

**Tip:** Only enable what you really need — this keeps the interface clean!

sensors.title: Select Sensors
sensors.description:
**Choose which sensors to display**

Only selected sensors are shown in Home Assistant
Changes take effect immediately

**Tip:** Only select the sensors you actually want to monitor!

settings.title: General Settings
settings.description:
**Adjust technical parameters**

Polling interval: How often data is fetched
Timeout: Maximum wait time for responses
Retry attempts: Number of retry attempts
Force update: Always update all entities
Diagnostic logging: Extended logging

**Tip:** Default values work for most setups!

data_description.retry_attempts: Number of retry attempts on failure (1-10)
data_description.enable_diagnostic_logging: Verbose logs on every update (diagnostics only!)
data_description.force_update: Always update entities even if value unchanged

pump_error.message: Pump error while controlling {device}: {detail}. Check if the pump is in an error state or verify pump configuration.

value_out_of_range.message: Value {value} is outside the valid range ({min}–{max})

no_api_key.message: No API key configured for entity {entity}

controller_unavailable.message: Pool controller {name} is unavailable after {failures} consecutive failures

controller_unavailable.title: Pool Controller Unavailable
controller_unavailable.description:
The pool controller **{name}** has been unreachable for {failures} consecutive polling cycles.

Please check:
- Is the controller powered on?
- Is the network connection OK?
- Is the IP address still correct?

Once the controller is reachable again, this issue will be resolved automatically.

control_pump.name: Pump Control
control_pump.description: Control the pool pump with advanced options like speed, eco mode, or boost.

action.name: Control action
action.description: Select: speed_control, force_off, eco_mode, boost_mode, or auto.

duration.name: Duration (seconds)
duration.description: How long to apply the action (0 = indefinite).

smart_dosing.name: Smart Dosing
smart_dosing.description:
Manual or automatic dosing control for pH, chlorine, and flocculant.

**Caution:** Avoid overdosing! Always check water values beforehand.

dosing_type.name: Dosing chemical
dosing_type.description: Select the chemical type (pH-, pH+, Chlorine, Flocculant).

safety_override.name: Override safety interval
safety_override.description: Skip the safety interval between dosing cycles.

manage_pv_surplus.name: PV Surplus Management
manage_pv_surplus.description:
Control photovoltaic surplus mode for optimal solar power utilisation.

Pool devices are automatically powered with surplus solar energy.

pump_speed.name: Pump speed
pump_speed.description: Desired pump output for PV mode (1=Eco, 2=Normal, 3=Maximum).

control_dmx_scenes.name: DMX Scene Control
control_dmx_scenes.description: Control DMX lighting scenes for pool area illumination.

action.name: DMX action
action.description: Select: all_on, all_off, all_auto, sequence, or party_mode.

sequence_delay.name: Sequence delay (seconds)
sequence_delay.description: Delay between scenes in sequence mode (1-60s).

set_light_color_pulse.name: Light Color Pulse
set_light_color_pulse.description: Send color pulse commands to pool lighting.

pulse_count.name: Number of pulses
pulse_count.description: How many color pulses to send (1-10).

manage_digital_rules.name: Digital Rules Management
manage_digital_rules.description: Manage digital input automation rules for controller inputs.

rule_key.name: Rule to manage
rule_key.description: Select the digital rule (DIRULE_1 through DIRULE_7).

test_output.name: Output Test Mode
test_output.description: Temporarily activates a controller output for diagnostics. Make sure no people or equipment are at risk while the output is forced.

output.name: Output identifier
output.description: Identifier such as PUMP, HEATER or SOLAR.

get_connection_status.name: Get Connection Status
get_connection_status.description: Get detailed connection status and health metrics for troubleshooting.

get_error_summary.name: Get Error Summary
get_error_summary.description: Get summary of recent errors and recovery suggestions.

test_connection.name: Test Connection
test_connection.description: Test connection to the controller and return diagnostic information.

clear_error_history.name: Clear Error History
clear_error_history.description: Clear error history after successful recovery (use with caution).

set_all_dmx_scenes_mode.name: Control DMX lighting
set_all_dmx_scenes_mode.description:
Controls **all DMX light scenes** simultaneously.

Perfect for uniform lighting effects or complete on/off switching.

device_id.name: Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller with DMX output.

set_digital_input_rule_lock_state.name: Lock switching rule
set_digital_input_rule_lock_state.description:
Locks or unlocks **digital switching rules**.

Prevents unwanted triggering during maintenance or disturbances.

device_id.name: Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller with digital rules.

rule_key.name: Rule number
rule_key.description: Number of the rule to lock (DIRULE_1 to DIRULE_7).

trigger_digital_input_rule.name: Trigger switching rule
trigger_digital_input_rule.description:
Manually triggers a **digital switching rule**.

Useful for testing automations or for manual control when needed.

device_id.name: Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller with the rules.

rule_key.name: Rule number
rule_key.description: Which rule to trigger? (DIRULE_1 to DIRULE_7)

export_diagnostic_logs.name: Export diagnostic logs
export_diagnostic_logs.description:
Exports **recent integration logs** for troubleshooting and support.

Collects relevant log entries and enables download or file storage.

**Tip:** Useful for problems or when sending logs to support!

device_id.name: Pool Controller
device_id.description: Violet Pool Controller for the export

lines.name: Number of lines
lines.description: How many recent log lines to export? (10-1000)

include_timestamps.name: Include timestamps
include_timestamps.description: Include timestamps in the exported logs

save_to_file.name: Save as file
save_to_file.description: Save logs as text file in the /config/ directory
